transcript.text:
[A place full of nostalgia]
What's going on?!
[Tzuyang is here]
[Ordered everything on the menu]
1 bag of Jjangu (snack) on me if you finish it all!
[Can't resist Jjapaghetti noodles]
[My bag of Jjangu...]
[All going down 1 by 1]
[Thumbs up]
[Thumbs up all-around]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Eulji-ro today
I'm going to go to a convenience store bar
I've actually been to one before for a TV show
I'm going to a different one today
[Daesung Shikpoom] [Jung-gu, Seoul]

[It's been here for a very long time]
Do they sell Jjapaghetti noodles?
They even sell rice wine
[Quit that]
Yes, they have everything
How many are you eating?
7-8?
[What in the world is going on?]
[How big is 8 packs?]
No no no no
You can't do it
Cook it well for her
These kinds of places carry a nostalgic ambiance
Even the menu looks 50 years old
What's popular here?
A lot of younger people come here often

Jjapaghetti noodles, spicy pupa soup, pan-fried ham?
Pan-fried ham, pupa soup, spicy pork bulgogi,
Steamed dumplings,
And 4 bags of jjapaghetti noodles, please
How will you eat all of that? Even 1 is too much for you
She will eat it all
Don't worry
[Thumbs up all-around]
-Can I eat the chips here? -Yes
I'm going to eat the potato chips There are more over there
-Take the drinks too? -Yes
Plum juice
Powerade
[A little too much for an appetizer, no?]
[This isn't enough]
Sausage!

Whelk too
They have everything here
[Stop.. eating!!]
[You have a lot of food coming up]
[Pan-fried ham]
[Spicy pork bulgogi]
[Spicy pupa soup]
[Steamed dumplings]
[All of the popular dishes]
[And today's highlight!]
[Jjapaghetti (black bean instant noodles)]
[Can't forget the eggs]
Thank you
Thank you
Do you happen to be the owner here or something?
Thank you

Thank you
This is the ham
1 bag of Jjangu (snack) on me if you finish it all!
[Just for you!]
Wow, thank you
Enjoy!
Thank you
This looks so delicious
The right amount of sauce
Break the egg yolk
It's been a while and it's amazing
The noodles are not dried out because it has enough sauce
It's going away too fast
Jjapaghetti and dumpling together
It tastes even better together The dumplings are yummy
[Don't forget to breathe!]

1 down
That went away too fast
Pan-fried ham this time
She cooked it with eggs
Looks good
Yummy
It's not spam, is it?
Its texture and taste is just like spam, but it's not salty at all
How is it not salty?
Spicy pork bulgogi next
It's cooked with kimchi
Delicious
A perfect dish for some drinks
Pupa
Amazing
Everything here calls for some alcohol

Pop the yolk
Looks tasty
[1 fried egg as a whole]
This should go well with ham
Ham and jjapaghetti combination is incredible
Kimchi! Thank you!
That looks good Can't forget kimchi when eating jjapaghetti
It's good
[I know it's good, but slow down!]
This is no joke
Today's weather is so nice
So you can get a table outdoors
I'll probably do that next time I come here
Put it like this because the ham is not salty
Kimchi tastes good, so the dish can't go wrong
I had to warm up everything again because the food got a little cold

Pop it
Looks good
Let's put this here for a bit
Put it like this
Wrap it with ham
I wonder who invented Jjapaghetti
It just tastes too good
How did they come up with this?
Jjajangmyun is good too, but this is really different
It has that unique flavor
It's really delicious
Dumplings
I wonder which brand dumplings these are
Let me try to figure out
This is...
Bibigo?

[Nope]
Some pupa
A spoonful
Get some kimchi on the dumplings
Everything here goes well together
It's all good with jjapaghetti noodles
[Me too...?]
That spicy flavor
This one too
It's good
Some soup
Last piece of ham
Ham-paghetti
Come to think of it, it's "paghetti"
So is it Spaghetti+Jjajamyun=Jjapaghetti?
Last one!

[Finished]
Thanks everyone
[Here's a bag of Jjangu]
[A man of his word]
Another bag for you
Thank you
Thank you very much
[We are gganbu now] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
